name: SoheeGroupSMS
purpose: Read the JSON payload copied by the Sohee app and send one SMS/iMessage request per recipient through Apple Shortcuts.

installability.reason: Apple Shortcuts does not provide an official plain-text shortcut source format that iOS can import directly. This file is the canonical source spec for manual creation, review, and future generation of a signed .shortcut file or iCloud shared shortcut.
recommendedDistribution: Create or update the shortcut once in Apple Shortcuts.
Share it as an iCloud Shortcut link or exported shortcut file.
Store the iCloud link in the app's Group SMS setup screen.

passed: automatic sequential sending without per-message confirmation

notes: iOS 버전에 따라 '입력에서 사전 가져오기' 또는 'JSON에서 사전 가져오기'처럼 보일 수 있다.

children.recipientCountRule: Always send to exactly one recipient in the current repeat item.
koreanUiNotes: '받는 사람'을 짧게 누르면 연락처 선택기가 열린다.
'받는 사람'을 길게 누르고 '변수 선택'을 선택한 뒤 PhoneNumber를 지정한다.
자동 반복 발송에서는 검증용 '텍스트'와 '알림 보기'를 반복 안에서 제거한다.

validationOnlyVariant.name: SoheeGroupSMS-검증용
validationOnlyVariant.difference: Replace the '메시지 보내기' action with a '결과 보기' or '알림 보기' action that displays PhoneNumber and MessageBody. Use this before real SMS testing.

testPlan.name: Payload read test
testPlan.expectedResult: Shortcut displays PhoneNumber and MessageBody without sending.

testPlan.name: One real message to user's own second number
testPlan.expectedResult: One message is created/sent to exactly one recipient.

testPlan.name: Repeated test to user's own numbers
testPlan.expectedResult: Messages are sent one by one without creating a group chat.

testPlan.name: Delay and callback test
testPlan.expectedResult: Each planned delay is applied and the app receives the correct completion/cancel/error callback.

testPlan.name: Attachment transport test
testPlan.expectedResult: One selected photo is delivered with or alongside the expected body without changing the recipient count.

notes: The simulator can be useful for app UI and payload creation.
Real SMS/iMessage sending, carrier limits, and recipient delivery must be validated on a physical iPhone with the user's phone numbers.
Shortcuts behavior on simulator may differ from a real device and should not be treated as final validation.
